location.office_time_required: 3 days in the office per week

level_signals: Proven experience leading large, complex, highly technical cross-functional teams
Sets strategy and executes across security, legal, compliance, finance, and engineering
Mentoring/leading others mentioned as a plus

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Have experience in security, privacy, data infrastructure, or usage-based platform products.
Strong understanding of data governance, access controls, and enterprise identity.
Experience with usage metering, cost-management tooling, or billing-adjacent systems.
Ability to work across security, legal, engineering, compliance, and finance domains.
Strong systems thinking, analytical skills, and comfort operating in high-risk, high-trust areas.
Proven experience leading large, complex, highly technical cross-functional teams.
Excellent communication and ability to drive alignment across complex technical and regulatory environments.

scope.surface: API data processing, data privacy, billing, and access controls products
primary_metrics_inferred: Enterprise customer adoption of data control and compliance features
Developer spend visibility and cost predictability
core_responsibilities: Develop an enterprise data control plane to securely access and manage enterprise data for LLM use
Drive product strategy for safety controls, privacy features, access management, and API usage/cost visibility
Build and improve data governance capabilities: retention, encryption, audit logs, permissions, and lifecycle management
Lead development of access control models, identity flows (SSO/SAML, SCIM), and admin tooling
Oversee usage metering, cost dashboards, alerts, budgeting tools, and predictable API cost experiences

green_flags: Clear product surface and ownership area (data control plane, billing, access controls)
Role partners directly with engineering, security, legal, compliance, finance, and leadership — high visibility
Well-defined hybrid policy (3 days/week in office)
OpenAI is a marquee AI company with significant market impact
red_flags: Years of experience not specified, making seniority level ambiguous
High-trust, high-risk regulatory and compliance environment may narrow candidate pool significantly

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from 'experienced' language, complexity of scope, and cross-functional leadership requirement; no explicit level stated)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not stated in JD)
location.visa_sponsorship (not mentioned in JD; marked unclear)
ambiguities: The JD lists requirements under 'You might thrive in this role if you:' which is softer language, but the items read as de facto requirements for this highly technical role. They have been classified as hard must_haves accordingly, with one explicit 'plus' item (mentoring) classified as soft.
Years of experience not stated anywhere; seniority inferred from scope and description as 'experienced Product Manager' leading 'large, complex, highly technical cross-functional teams'.
